arts.ttl: Hasil Semifinal Liga Champions: Arsenal Gigit Jari, PSG Tantang Inter Milan di Final
arts.sum: PSG menjejak ke final Liga Champions usai pada leg kedua semifinal mengalahkan Arsenal dengan skor 2-1 di Parc des Princes hari Kamis (08/05/2025) dini hari WIB.

arts.ttl: Fans Roast Mikel Arteta Over Postgame Remarks After Arsenal's UCL Loss to PSG
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta said he thought the best team lost after Arsenal's Champions League defeat to PSG

arts.ttl: Arsenal can't shake nearly-men tag as PSG's collective wins out
arts.athr: Mark Ogden and James Olley and Julien Laurens and Gabriele Marcotti
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain will get a second chance to heal their 2020 Champions League final heartbreak, where more soul-searching will occur at Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Chelsea's sly dig, a bizarre joke from Patrice Evra and even Ryanair having a pop... how Arsenal were brutally mocked after being dumped out of Champions League by PSG
arts.sum: Arsenal were mercilessly mocked after their Champions League semi-final heartbreak. Opposition fans, teams, companies and ex-players rubbed salt in the wounds of the Gunners.

arts.ttl: PSG (3) 2-1 (1) Arsenal: Lighthearted Luis Enrique jokes about the perceptions of his side following Champions League semi-final victory
arts.sum: Luis Enrique jokes that his Paris Saint-Germain side come from the "league of farmers" following their Champions League semi-final success over Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta details what PSG coaches told him about Arsenal after Champions League exit
arts.sum: Arsenal were eliminated from the Champions League by Paris Saint-Germain, who will go on to face Inter Milan in a mouthwatering final later this month in Munich

arts.ttl: 'Their best player has been the goalkeeper': Mikel Arteta insists Arsenal were 'a lot closer' than the result suggested against PSG and Gianluigi Donnarumma was the difference maker
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has claimed that goalkeeper Gianluigi Donnarumma was Paris Saint-Germain's best player and the difference maker as the French side dumped Arsenal out of the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Arsene Wenger gives his verdict on Arsenal's bitter Champions League exit to PSG - and pinpoints key area where the tie was lost for the Gunners
arts.sum: Arsene Wenger has given his verdict on Arsenal's heartbreaking Champions League exit against PSG, after his former team crashed out at the semi-final stage following a 3-1 defeat on aggregate.

arts.ttl: PSG (3) 2-1 (1) Arsenal: Gunners set new unwanted club streak following Champions League elimination
arts.sum: Arsenal set a new unwanted club record following their elimination from the Champions League at the hands of Paris Saint-Germain in France this evening.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta insists Arsenal were the BEST team in the Champions League despite PSG loss - and reveals stars' emotional reaction in dressing room
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN AT PARC DES PRINCES: An emotional Mikel Arteta claimed Arsenal did not deserve to lose against Paris Saint-Germain after they crashed out of the Champions League.
